text.title: Research Repository Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does a research repository already exist?

branch.question: Will AI tagging run on transcripts?

conclusion.verdict: set up taxonomy + access + ingestion + 90-day backfill

example.trace: exists=false -> scoring=done -> zdr=ready -> set up + backfill + launch.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
